labels.label: Acne-like texture or inflammatory spots

labels.label: Rosacea-like facial redness
labels.rationale: The trained classifier found central facial redness patterns.

labels.rationale: The trained classifier found uneven tone or pigmentation-like patterns.

labels.rationale: The trained classifier found bump-like patterns around follicles.
